title: Workbench Launcher
description: The Workbench Launcher is your starting point for investigation workspaces. Browse recent investigations, open an existing workspace, or create a new investigation to begin your analysis.
tips: Create a new investigation to organize your analysis questions, cohort queries, and results in one workspace.
Recent investigations are listed with their last-modified date so you can quickly resume work.
Each investigation can contain multiple cohort definitions, analyses, and exported results.
Use the search bar to find investigations by name or description across your team.
